textPlain: Nice project! The install instructions generator looks a lot like the one Alpic built: https://mcp-install-instructions.alpic.cloud/
How does auth work in practice?  What’s the login process from the user’s PoV?
I would be extremely cautious about what you log from LLMs in a cloud MCP server, who you make those logs available to,  data retention policies, etc.They are going to be a PII landmine.
